function_explanation: Formats a floating-point number into a string with 17 decimal places.
function_docstring:
def strfloat(x):
    """
    Formats a floating-point number into a string with 17 decimal places.

    Args:
        x (float): A floating-point number to be formatted.

    Returns:
        str: A string representation of the floating-point number with 17 decimal places.
